title: Paronychia cephalotes

The genus Paronychia is a group of small, annual or perennial herbs that are native to tropical and subtropical regions around the world. The exact classification of Paronychia cephalotes may vary depending on the source and the specific criteria used.

intro: Paronychia cephalotes, also known as Paronychia, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Nyctaginaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing, reduce pain, and protect against infections.
